name: Parallel Boosters
file: /Users/darnold/Music/Ableton/Packs/Skitter and Step/Effect Racks/Distortion/Parallel Boosters.adg
description:
A complex set of parallel chains carefully fine-tuned to enhance, warm up, compress and distort your sounds. Works for drums but can also be used for synths, basses and even full program material with more relaxed settings (lower knob values). Knob value 0 turns the processors off in the macro and thus saves cpu.
Check the individual macro controls for the specifics.
